title: Adadada Arrambame Lyrics Arrambam Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Adadada Arrambame
Singer: Shankar Mahadhevan
Music : Yuvan
Lyrics: Pa VIjay

Podu podu sound-u pattayathaan murikanuda
aadu aadu round-u sevilellaam pirikanuda
ye vanathuke vedivachi paarpomada
ye megamellaam melatha vaasikka
thaalaththa vaasikka aatatha aaramippom

Adadada aarambamey, ippo adhirudhadaa..
adadadaa aaagaayamey ippa alarudhada

Ye solli vachi adichaa,
kai pulli vachi pudichaa
nam orrukulla una suthi oilivattamey

Ye pandhayathil jeyichaa,
nee vallavan thothaa
yemaandhavaa ada poda un sattamey

Nee atthi poova vedhachaaley
thanni vittu nenachaaley
andha vidahi arali poo kodukaadhadaa

Adadada aarambamey, ippo adhirudhadaa..
adadadaa aaagaayamey ippa alarudhada

Ye nethirundha raaja
dhee raajanallaam inmai
ikaanavillai idhudhaandaa nijamaanadhu

Ye unna suthi poopoda
aalirukkum pugal paada
vaayirikkum ellaamey nizhalanadhu

Nam aasapattu vazhurandaa
edhukaaga ikanamdhaan ellaamey kondaatamey

Adadada aarambamey, ippo adhirudhadaa..
adadadaa aaagaayamey ippa alarudhada

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who is the lead actor in the movie Arrambam?

The lead actor in the movie Arrambam is Ajith Kumar.

Who composed the music for the song Adadada Arrambame?

The music for the song Adadada Arrambame was composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

What is the mood of the song Adadada Arrambame?

The song Adadada Arrambame has an energetic and motivational mood.

When was the movie Arrambam released?

The movie Arrambam was released in the year 2013.

Who wrote the lyrics for the song Adadada Arrambame?

The lyrics for the song Adadada Arrambame were penned by Pa Vijay.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Adadada Arrambame from the movie Arrambam, released in 2013, features the dynamic performances of Ajith Kumar and Nayanthara. Sung by Shankar Mahadevan and composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja, the track is an energetic and motivational anthem. Its vibrant beats and inspiring lyrics encapsulate the spirit of celebration and determination. This song is a perfect choice for uplifting moments and festive occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Adadada Arrambame from the movie Arrambam is a high-energy track that showcases the vibrant collaboration between Shankar Mahadevan's powerful vocals and Yuvan Shankar Raja's dynamic composition. This song, featuring the charismatic Ajith Kumar and the talented Nayanthara, captures the essence of celebration and motivation. Its pulsating beats and inspiring lyrics make it a must-listen for fans of Tamil cinema music.
stanzaMeanings: Oh, the beginning, let the sound resonate and the sparks fly, let's dance in circles and break all barriers. Let's light up the sky and play music with the clouds, starting the rhythm of life.
Oh, the beginning, now it's shaking everything. Oh, the sky, now it's blooming.
If we hit with determination and grab with precision, within our circle, everything revolves around us.
If you win the race, you're skilled; if you lose, you're deceived. Forget the noise and move forward.
If you plant the fig flower and water it, it won't yield the desired arali flower.
Oh, the beginning, now it's shaking everything. Oh, the sky, now it's blooming.
The king who sits on the throne isn't always the true ruler; this is the reality.
Around you, there are people with flowers, singing praises, but everything is just an illusion.
The path we desired and pursued, for what purpose is this celebration?
Oh, the beginning, now it's shaking everything. Oh, the sky, now it's blooming.
This stanza appears to list song details and does not contain lyrics to translate.
